description: compute_average_latency filters NaN values before averaging; compute_average_size and compute_average_count sum the input directly.

findings.rationale: compute_average_latency adds a list-comprehension filter for NaN values that the other two averagers omit. The filter is load-bearing: latency samples can legitimately be NaN (timed-out probes), and sum() over any list containing NaN yields NaN, poisoning downstream SLO dashboards. An agent that unifies onto a shared average() will drop the filter unless warned.
